case_title: KENNEY, ANNE M. VS WALDMAN, MICHAEL C/O A ONE CAR RENTAL et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KENNEY, ANNE M. AS TO DEFENDANT WALDMAN, MICHAEL C/O A ONE CAR RENTAL A ONE RENT-A CAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALDMAN, MICHAEL C/O A ONE CAR RENTAL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KENNEY, ANNE M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WALDMAN, MICHAEL C/O A ONE CAR RENTAL A ONE RENT-A CAR DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFT WALDMAN, MICHAEL. DEFT A ONE RENT-A-A CAR IS PROPER DEFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
